overview.name: GraphQL Variables
overview.description:
This scenario verifies GraphQL request execution using variables.
Test flow includes: 1. Create variables for endpoint, title, author, number and expected files. 2. Execute GraphQL mutation using variable values. 3. Verify create response = 200. 4. Execute GraphQL query by title using variable value. 5. Verify returned book matches expected response. 6. Execute GraphQL query to retrieve all books. 7. Verify created book exists in storage. 8. Reset GraphQL storage after test.
This scenario validates: - Variable interpolation inside GraphQL request body - Variable interpolation inside GraphQL query params - Variable reuse across mutation and query flow - Stable GraphQL execution with reusable values

graphql.comment: Step 2-3. Create GraphQL book using variable values
Step 6-7. Retrieve all GraphQL books and verify created book exists
Step 8. Reset GraphQL storage after variables test
